title: Italian Sausage Wrap
description: A delicious and easy-to-make wrap filled with Italian sausage, melted cheese, and crispy vegetables.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Cook the Italian sausage for 5-7 minutes, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the Canadian bacon to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Warm the wrap in the microwave for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by spooning the sausage and bacon mixture onto the center of the wrap.
Sprinkle with Italian seasoning and shredded mozzarella cheese.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a tight cylinder.
Slice in half and serve immediately.
